description: Metadata-routing cases for the six user-facing Design Judge skills.

cases.prompt: Plan the complete award journey for this student concept from evaluation through final submission.
I have a board and a product manual but do not know what to do next for design awards.
Find officially verified award winners in the same functional category as this rehabilitation device.
Find Red Dot winners with a similar visible form language and compare observable attributes.
Evaluate this student concept board and report design, presentation, confidence, and Critical risks separately.
Batch-score these designs and shortlist them within separate maturity tracks.
Compare iF Student, Red Dot Concept, DIA, and James Dyson for this project.
Which award route and entry category best fits this mature medical product?
Use these attachments to prepare every IDEA entry field and check the word limits.
Extract a reusable evidence-linked project dossier from this brief, report, and patent.
Audit this package against the current iF Student technical and required-material rules.
Find factual conflicts across the board, manual, video script, and entry copy, then return go or no-go.
